aur is pal ko khaas banana chahte hain... 🪔

Shrutiii!
🙏 राधे राधे 🦚
🦚  Shrutiii ke liye  🌸

Aap jo Radhe Radhe ka jaap karti hain —
us prem aur bhakti mein jo sukoon hai,
wahi aapki sabse pyaari pehchaan hai. 🙏

राधे राधे

Aaj Radha Rani se yahi dua hai ki
aapki zindagi mein hamesha khushiyaan barsein —
jaise Vrindavan ke phool khilte hain. 🌸

Yeh janamdin aapke liye
sabse sundar, sabse khaas din ban jaaye. 💛

With love — Sopan Bhoyar  🦚
🦚
Ab ek sawaal hai
aapke liye —Vrindavan
Chalogi? 🙏

Prem Mandir ki yeh roshni,
Radha Rani ka yeh dham —
aapke saath dekhna chahte hain... 🌸

(No button thoda shy hai 😄)

Radha Rani ki aashirwaad
aapke liye 🦚
🌸Aapka dil hamesha paak, khush aur shanti se bhara rahe
🦚Bhakti ka yeh sundar raasta hamesha roshan rahe aapke liye
💛Har sapna poora ho, har dua qubool ho, Shrutiii
🪔Diya ki tarah aap hamesha doosron ke liye jagmagate rahiye
🌿Zindagi mein sukoon aur prem kabhi kam na ho
🙏Radhe Radhe — Radha Rani ki kripa hamesha bani rahe
🕉️
॥ राधे राधे ॥
Happy Birthday
Shrutiii! 🎂

Vrindavan ke har phool ki tarah
aap bhi hamesha khilte rahiye. 🌸

Radha Rani ki kripa
hamesha aap par bani rahe 🙏

Aur haan —
Vrindavan ka safar
bahut jald hoga... 🦚💛

with all love & prayers
Sopan Bhoyar
🙏 राधे राधे 🙏
